task: Negotiate a purchase agreement for Ranch Property in Montana (Real Estate). The only negotiated term is unit_price_usd. Catalog retail is $7500000.00 and wholesale is $6000000.00. Product features: 200-acre working ranch with 5-bedroom main house and multiple outbuildings. Reference: https://www.hallhall.com/

agent_a.system_goal: You are the supplier for Ranch Property in Montana. Maximize unit_price_usd while preserving margin over wholesale cost and closing a deal quickly.

agent_b.system_goal: You are buying Ranch Property in Montana. Minimize unit_price_usd while staying within budget and trying to close at a realistic market price.
